overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a coastal dirt path through lush green terrain toward a historic stone lighthouse tower. The scene features bright summer lighting with scattered clouds, dense vegetation, and ocean views to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested coastal trail with ocean glimpses

events.description: stone lighthouse tower becomes visible through the trees in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through tall grass and deciduous trees

entered.detail: tall leafy trees lining the left side of the path
tall leafy trees lining the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the grass
blue sea visible through gaps in the trees on the right
hazy mountains visible on the horizon
tall cylindrical stone tower with red roof on a distant hill

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow forested coastal trail with dense vegetation on both sides. The camera follows Geralt walking forward as the stone lighthouse tower first becomes visible through the trees in the distance around the 8-second mark. The ocean is visible to the right through gaps in the foliage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassy coastal meadow approaching the lighthouse

events.description: camera tilts upward to look up at the lighthouse tower as it grows larger in the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path with the lighthouse growing larger ahead, occasionally glancing at the ocean

entered.detail: lush green grass covering the rolling terrain on the left
lush green grass covering the rolling terrain on the right
wooden platform and stairs attached to the side of the lighthouse tower

segments.scene_description: The trees give way to open grassy hillsides as the path winds toward the lighthouse. The stone tower grows significantly larger in the frame, and wooden scaffolding attached to its side becomes visible. The camera tilts upward around 35 seconds to emphasize the tower's height against the cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky base of the lighthouse tower

agents.ego_description: walking around the base of the lighthouse on the narrow path, examining the stone structure from different angles

entered.detail: rocky outcrops and boulders at the base of the lighthouse hill

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the approach to the lighthouse base, with rocky terrain becoming prominent on the right. The character walks along the narrow path circling the tower, causing the lighthouse to shift from center to left of frame. The wooden scaffolding disappears behind the tower as the camera moves around it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal trail that transitions from a dense forest into an open, rocky landscape dominated by a towering stone lighthouse. It begins on a narrow path enclosed by thick vegetation, with the ocean glimpsed through the foliage as the lighthouse first appears in the distance. As the trees give way to open grassy hillsides, the path winds closer to the structure, revealing wooden scaffolding and prompting the camera to tilt upward to emphasize the tower's height against a cloudy sky. The scene then shifts toward the base of the lighthouse where the terrain becomes increasingly rocky, before the camera circles the tower to move the structure from the center to the left of the frame.
